result:
I don’t “want” anything from you—I don’t have personal goals, needs, or intentions. I’m just a tool that responds to what you type.

If you mean “what is this chat for?”, it’s for whatever you choose: asking questions, exploring an idea, getting feedback, generating text, troubleshooting, or just talking.

If you tell me what prompted the question (e.g., something I said that felt pushy or odd), I can explain exactly why it happened.

content.text:
I don’t “want” anything from you—I don’t have personal goals, needs, or intentions. I’m just a tool that responds to what you type.

If you mean “what is this chat for?”, it’s for whatever you choose: asking questions, exploring an idea, getting feedback, generating text, troubleshooting, or just talking.

If you tell me what prompted the question (e.g., something I said that felt pushy or odd), I can explain exactly why it happened.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you want?
